description: Repair normalize_records so it returns a new list sorted by numeric id. Each output record must have exactly id, name, and active. Read ids from id, record_id, or profile.id, coercing numeric id strings to ints. Read names from name, full_name, or profile.name, trimming whitespace and title-casing. Convert active booleans and string tokens after trimming and lowercasing/case-insensitive matching: yes/y/true/1/active to True, and no/n/false/0/inactive to False; missing active defaults to False. When duplicate ids appear, choose active from the greatest source priority (manual > import > missing/other), then greatest numeric updated_at timestamp, then later input order. Choose name from the latest nonblank name by numeric updated_at, breaking ties by later input order. Rows with status deleted/remove or deleted set to True are tombstones; if the winning active/status row for an id is a tombstone, omit that id. Reject records missing id or name, nonnumeric ids, or unknown active tokens with ValueError. Do not mutate inputs.
